TEXT.body: {"ELIGIBILITY":{"inclusion":"o BMI < 30 kg/m2 o Patients belonging to ASA PS I, II and III o Patients requiring anaesthesia for short surgeries.","exclusion":"o Patients undergoing emergency surgery o Risk of aspiration (full stomach) o Mouth opening of <2.5cm, o Upper airway pathology precluding i-gel insertion o Known cervical spine disease","ageFrom":"18.00 Year(s)","ageTo":"65.00 Year(s)","gender":"Both"}}
